summary: DOB attributes longer waits for plumbing inspections to ongoing budget constraints and reduced inspector staffing capacity, the same explanation the agency gives for slower inspection turnaround across other trades. A 2025 city Comptroller audit similarly found DOB staffing reductions contributed to slower processing times.

sources.label: NYC Comptroller, Audit of the New York City Department of Buildings' Enforcement of Building Codes (Apr. 21, 2025)

oneLiner: increasing, which DOB attributes to budget constraints and reduced staffing
